title: Add '-' minus syntax for removal of config values
body:
Minus syntax for `--env`, `--label`, and `-annotation` flags for `buildah config` subcommand.
 #1399,  #1670

Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <ashleycui16@gmail.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@TomSweeneyRedHat  I added examples under the ## EXAMPLE section, if that's okay. PTAL
LGTM, @ashley-cui thanks for the examples and I concur with the location.

@rh-atomic-bot r+
@ashley-cui Now we need the same in podman.
